g.text: Note: Virtual memory allows (pos % size) calculation without branching

ol.li:
bpf_ringbuf_reserve():
producer_pos += aligned_len
Header marked BUSY
Write: Direct memory copy to payload

bpf_ringbuf_submit():
BUSY bit cleared
IRQ triggered for userland

ring_buffer__consume():
User reads LEN data
consumer_pos += aligned_len

ul.li: Alignment: Strict 8-byte boundary enforced by kernel
